settings.heading: Where is it made?
settings.content: Using Nano-Crystalline technology, Bleame™ Crystal Hair Eraser allows the hair to clump and break from the surface when rubbed gently on the skin. This process also helps exfoliate, revealing baby smooth skin after use 💜

settings.heading: Instructions
settings.content:
Prep Your Skin

Exfoliate your skin no less than 24 hours before use. If you have sensitive skin, exfoliate no less than 48 hours before use.

Patch Test for Sensitivity

Conduct a patch test on a small area of each leg: one with damp skin and the other with dry skin. Test with moisture barriers like hypoallergenic moisturizer or cream. Allow it to fully absorb before using your Eraser. For added comfort, test with a protective layer of shaving gel or cream.

Get to action

After a successful patch test, treat your desired areas using the method and technique that felt most comfortable during testing. Start with gentle, circular motions and light pressure. Adjust your technique as needed, avoiding excessive pressure that may cause irritation. Take breaks between passes and use shorter strokes to minimize friction and heat.

Aftercare for Soothing Relief

Rinse the treated area with cool water and gently pat it dry, avoiding rubbing. Apply a fragrance-free, hypoallergenic moisturizer. For an extra relief, use a cold compress for 10-15 minutes.

Caring for Your Eraser

After each use, rinse your Crystal Hair Eraser under running water to remove hair and exfoliated skin. Store the eraser in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight and humidity.
Important Note: If you experience any discomfort or irritation during or after use, discontinue use immediately. Visit our Help Center for more information.

settings.heading: Return & Refund Policy
settings.content:
1.1 Return Due To Change Of Mind

Nutrawayy will happily accept returns due to change of mind as long as a request to return is received by us within 72 hours of receipt of item. 

Once approved, refunds will be processed to their original payment method. We will notify you once this has been completed through email.

Ark drop will refund the value of the goods returned but will NOT refund the value of any shipping paid.

1.2 Cancellations

If you change your mind before a tracking numbers has been generated, we are able to accept cancellations at any time before the order has been dispatched. If an order has already been dispatched, please refer to our refund policy.

settings.heading: Look At How Others Are Loving Their Bleame
settings.text: These women are actual Bleame customers that have seen results with consistent use of Bleame's Gua Sha Facial Set!

Say goodbye to restless nights and groggy mornings. Sleep Drops by DropFX is a fast-acting, natural sleep solution designed to help you fall asleep quickly, stay asleep longer, and wake up feeling refreshed—without pills or morning fog.

settings.heading: Key Benefits of DropFX Sleep Drops

settings.text:
Faster Sleep Onset

The liquid formula allows for quick absorption, helping you fall asleep faster compared to traditional pills.

Deeper Sleep

Key ingredients are proven to significantly increase deep sleep, aiding in better recovery during the night.


Reduced Nighttime Awakenings

The drops help decrease the frequency of waking events during rest, leading to more consistent sleep.

Wake Up Refreshed

Users report feeling rested and serene during waking hours, without the grogginess associated with some sleep aids.


Natural Ingredients

Formulated with melatonin, valerian, and lavender, providing a natural solution for improving sleep quality.

settings.title: Melatonin is a hormone naturally produced by the pineal gland that regulates the sleep-wake cycle, signaling your body when it’s time to sleep. Supplementing melatonin can help reset disrupted circadian rhythms, making it easier to fall asleep faster and improve overall sleep quality.

Lavender (Lavandula angustifolia) is a widely recognized herb celebrated for its calming and therapeutic properties. In products like DropFX Sleep Drops, lavender plays a pivotal role in promoting relaxation and enhancing sleep quality
An herbal remedy known for its calming and sedative effects. It can reduce the time it takes to fall asleep and improve overall sleep quality without causing morning grogginess.

Chamomile is a gentle herb known for its calming and anti-inflammatory properties, often used to reduce anxiety and promote restful sleep. Its natural compounds, like apigenin, bind to brain receptors to help relax the nervous system and improve sleep quality.

settings.text: Top notes of vanilla and cinnamon, which give way to a heart of woody agarwood (oud), lavender and floral rose, with base notes of leather, amber, and musk. This combination creates a powerful and seductive scent that is sure to turn heads.

settings.faq-ques: Are Sleep Drops safe for asthmatics?
settings.faq-content: Yes! We've had a lot of positive feedback from asthmatics and people with other breathing conditions utilizing our drops. So far no contraindications have been reported.

settings.faq-ques: How do I use Sleep Drops?
settings.faq-content: Take the recommended dose 20–30 minutes before bed. Hold the drops under your tongue for a few seconds, then swallow.
Most people feel relaxed within 15–30 minutes of taking it.

settings.faq-ques: How long does it take to feel the effects?
settings.faq-content: ARK Drops provide an instant kick that leaves you feeling more motivated and energized. The long-term benefits typically occur after using ARK Drops for 10 days.

settings.faq-ques: Will I feel tired the next morning?
settings.faq-content: No, Sleep Drops are designed to help you fall asleep naturally without next-day grogginess.
